chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA.No.183 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 13.05.2025 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Tarar, advocate for respondents No.1 and 2. ------ None present for the appellant. No intimation is received. On the last date of hearing no one was present on behalf of the appellant. Accordingly, the High Court Appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
